CCP4i2Reportphaser_pipeline_report.CCP4i2ReportText: NMOL (2) set by analysis. If structure solution fails consider other tNCS
Patterson Pathology in NMOL analysis, possible coiled coil or other regular structure, view Patterson (TNCS PATT MAPS ON)

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: Elements and scores of current solution
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportText: Current best solution has spacegroup P 21 21 21

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Search ensembles and spacegroups
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
********************************************************************************************* *** Phaser Module: AUTOMATED MOLECULAR REPLACEMENT 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
** Steps: ** Cell Content Analysis ** Anisotropy correction ** Translational NCS correction ** Rotation Function ** Translation Function ** Packing ** Refinement ** Final Refinement (if data higher resolution than search resolution) ** Number of search ensembles = 2 ** Search Method: FAST ** Input Search Order: ** #1 Ensemble_1 ** #2 Ensemble_1 ** Automatic (best predicted) search order WILL be used
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 0.05 secs ( 0.05 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:31 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Cell content analysis
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: CELL CONTENT ANALYSIS 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Space-Group Name (Hall Symbol): P 21 21 21 ( P 2ac 2ab) Space-Group Number: 19 Unit Cell: 23.99 55.48 60.02 90.00 90.00 90.00
Composition is of type: PROTEIN MW to which Matthews applies: 7701 Resolution for Matthews calculation: 2.10
Z MW VM % solvent rel. freq. 1 7701 2.59 52.58 1.000 <== most probable 2 15403 1.30 5.15 0.004
Z is the number of multiples of the total composition In most cases the most probable Z value should be 1 If it is not 1, you may need to consider other compositions
Most probable VM for resolution = 2.2252 Most probable MW of protein in asu for resolution = 8976.39
CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 1.19 secs ( 1.19 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:33 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Translational non-crystallographic symmetry
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre: ****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: TRANSLATIONAL NON-CRYSTALLOGRAPHIC SYMMETRY 2.8.3 *** ****************************************************************************************** Resolution of All Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Resolution of Selected Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4894) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Warning: Patterson Pathology in NMOL analysis, possible coiled coil or other regular structure, view Patterson (TNCS PATT MAPS ON) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Advisory: NMOL (2) set by analysis. If structure solution fails consider other tNCS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Translational NCS Refinement ---------------------------- Test rotation #3 Final angle : -0.3440 -0.8927 0.6515 Final vector : -0.0046 0.3986 0.5017 tNCS D-values by resolution (low-high) : 0.9910 0.9468 -------- TWINNING -------- tNCS/Twin Detection Table ------------------------- -Second Moments- --P-values-- Centric Acentric untwinned twin frac < 5% Theoretical for untwinned 3.00 2.00 including measurement error 3.00 2.00 Theoretical for perfect twin 2.00 1.50 Initial (data as input) 4.59 2.99+/-0.113 1 1 After Anisotropy Correction 4.42 2.94+/-0.113 1 1 After Anisotropy and tNCS 2.44 2.08+/-0.114 1 1 P-value < 0.01 for < 5% twinned is considered worth investigating Resolution for Twin Analysis (85% I/SIGI > 3): 2.81A (HiRes= 2.10A) Resolution of All Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Resolution of Selected Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Translational NCS: Vector = -0.0046 0.3986 0.5017 Rotation = -0.3440 -0.8927 0.6515 D values (lores-hires)= 0.9910- 0.9468 CPU Time: 0 days 0 hrs 0 mins 17.66 secs ( 17.66 secs) Finished: Wed Jun 14 15:36:43 2023

CCP4i2ReportFold.label: ....Expected llg of ensembles
CCP4i2ReportFold.CCP4i2ReportPre:
****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: EXPECTED LLG OF ENSEMBLES 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Resolution of Data (Selected): 2.100 (2.1001) Number of Reflections (Selected): 4897 (4897) eLLG Target: 225
----------------- POLY-ALANINE ELLG -----------------
Resolution = 2.1001 Default RMSD = 0.1 0.2 0.4 0.8 1.6 3.2 Minimum solvent = 20% Maximum number of polyalanine residues = 87 (-full-) Alanine residues for eLLG target = 35
Table of Alanine Residues for eLLG Target ----------------------------------------- ---RMSD--- eLLG-target | 0.10 0.20 0.40 0.80 1.60 3.20 225 | 35 36 45 86 -full--full- 196 | 32 34 42 80 -full--full- 169 | 30 32 39 74 -full--full- 144 | 28 29 36 68 -full--full- 121 | 25 27 33 63 -full--full- 100 | 23 24 30 57 -full--full- 81 | 21 22 27 51 -full--full- 64 | 18 19 24 45 -full--full- 49 | 16 17 21 40 -full--full- 36 | 14 14 18 34 -full--full- 25 | 11 12 15 28 -full--full- 16 | 9 9 12 22 78 -full- 9 | 7 7 9 17 58 -full- 4 | 4 4 6 11 39 -full- 1 | 2 2 3 5 19 -full-
-------------- MONOMERIC ELLG --------------
Expected LLG (eLLG) ------------------- eLLG: eLLG of ensemble alone eLLG RMSD frac-scat Ensemble 298.9 0.410 0.48221 Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target -------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) eLLG-reso Ensemble 2.417 Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target: data collection ------------------------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) with perfect data eLLG-reso Ensemble 2.489 Ensemble_1
eLLG indicates that placement of a single copy of ensemble "Ensemble_1" should be easy
Expected LLG (eLLG): Chains --------------------------- eLLG: eLLG of chain alone eLLG RMSD frac-scat chain Ensemble 298.9 0.410 0.48221 " A" Ensemble_1
Resolution for eLLG target: Chains ---------------------------------- eLLG-reso: Resolution to achieve target eLLG (225) eLLG-reso chain Ensemble 2.417 " A" Ensemble_1
-------------------- HOMO-OLIGOMERIC ELLG --------------------
Number of copies for eLLG target -------------------------------- eLLG-target RMSD frac-scat-known frac-scat num-copies Ensemble 225 0.410 0.00000 0.48221 1 Ensemble_1

****************************************************************************************** *** Phaser Module: MOLECULAR REPLACEMENT TRANSLATION FUNCTION 2.8.3 *** ******************************************************************************************
Resolution of All Data (Number): 2.10 40.74 (4897) Resolution of Selected Data (Number): 2.42 40.74 (3236) Translational NCS: Vector = -0.0046 0.3986 0.5017 Rotation = -0.3440 -0.8927 0.6515 D values (lores-hires)= 0.9910- 0.9468
------------------------ ALTERNATIVE SPACE GROUPS ------------------------
Space Group(s) to be tested: P 21 21 21
---------------------------- TRANSLATION FUNCTION #1 OF 1 ----------------------------
This TF set has 7 trial orientations
5 trial orientations in initial search 2 trial orientations in deep search
New Top Packing Fast Translation Function FSS = 894.36 (TFZ=14.7) at Trial #1 New Top (ML) Translation Function LLG = 232.36 (TFZ=14.7) at Trial #1 ------------------------- DEEP TRANSLATION FUNCTION -------------------------
Best TFZ is over Z-score cutoff for definite solution (8.00) Do NOT search deep in trial orientation list
Translation Function Table -------------------------- SET ROT*deep Top (Z) Second (Z) Third (Z) SpaceGroup Ensemble 1 1 232.4 14.73 - - - - P 21 21 21 Ensemble 1 2 140.0 14.87 - - - - P 21 21 21 Ensemble 1 3 84.9 13.47 - - - - P 21 21 21 Ensemble 1 4 95.3 15.05 - - - - P 21 21 21 Ensemble 1 5 -598.9 9.35 - - - - P 21 21 21 Ensemble --- ---
--------------- FINAL SELECTION ---------------
LLG will be used for purge, not FSS Top TF = 232.36 Top TFZ = 15.05 Mean TF = -1368.21 Percent used for purge = 75% Cutoff for acceptance = -167.8 TFZ used for final selection = 8 Number of solutions over TF final cutoff = 4 Number of solutions over TFZ final cutoff = 5 Number of solutions over TF & TFZ cutoff = 4 Number of solutions stored before final selection = 5 Number of solutions stored (deleted) after final selection = 5 (0)

CCP4i2ReportGeneric.p: Note: R factors and free R factors are only comparable for cycles where the resolution is the same.
